prereq.p: Park the AGV in the designated maintenance area and switch off the power.

step.cmd: Inspect the battery connectors and compartment for damage or debris.
Align the battery with the guide rails in the compartment.
Slide the battery fully into the compartment until it is properly seated.
Connect the battery power connector securely.
Lock the battery in position using the retaining latch.
Switch on the AGV and verify the battery status on the HMI.
